emails.subject: FW: [Fwd: Enron Net Works NDA]
emails.body: FW: [Fwd: Enron Net Works NDA] Tana, Attached you will find the comments on the NDA from BoozAllen Hamilton. Any chance we could get this spun back to them today? I provided you with the wrong email address for Eduardo yesterday the correct address is: alvarez_eduardo@bah.com Regards, Ross To: Mesquita, Ross

emails.subject: RE: [Fwd: Enron Net Works NDA]
emails.body: RE: [Fwd: Enron Net Works NDA] Not unless it's critical. All the attorneys are out at an offsite today. Can this wait til Monday or is this critical? To: Jones, Tana

emails.subject: RE: [Fwd: Enron Net Works NDA]
emails.body: I am meeting with Eduardo at 9:30am on Monday, so is there any way someone can look at it today. I am fine with it being finalized on Monday morning before my meeting, but if there is a problem with their revised language need to address that today. Please let me know. Thanks Ross To: Mesquita, Ross
